shorts.hook: From Corporate Law to Fighting Trafficking
shorts.content: Leadership isn't about titles or corner offices—it's about having the courage to fight for what's right, even when the stakes are high.
shorts.title: Why She Left Corporate Law to Fight Human Trafficking

shorts.content: Undercover operations against trafficking require meticulous planning, courage, and collaboration with local authorities.
shorts.title: What Undercover Anti-Trafficking Work Really Looks Like

shorts.title: How to Use Your Corporate Skills for Social Justice

titleOptions.curiosityGap: What Made This Corporate Lawyer Risk Everything to Fight Trafficking?
titleOptions.boldStatement: She Left Corporate Law to Lead Dangerous Undercover Missions
titleOptions.numberBased: 5 Leadership Lessons from Fighting Human Trafficking

description:
From corporate boardrooms to dangerous undercover operations—this conversation will change how you think about leadership courage.

Human rights attorney Leigh Dundas shares her extraordinary journey from high-stakes corporate litigation to leading the fight against human trafficking.

🎯 TIMESTAMPS:
0:00 - Introduction
2:15 - Bold career pivot from corporate law
8:30 - First undercover trafficking mission
15:45 - Medical freedom and civil liberties
22:10 - Building grassroots movements
28:30 - Self-care in high-stakes advocacy
35:20 - Leadership lessons from the frontlines

🔑 KEY TAKEAWAYS:
• True leadership requires making bold pivots that align with your values
• Corporate skills can be powerfully redirected toward social justice
• Protecting human rights demands both courage and strategic planning
• Grassroots movements create change when individuals step up to lead
• Advocacy work requires intentional self-care and support systems

🤝 CONNECT WITH LEIGH:
🔗 Learn more about Leigh Dundas: https://www.leighdundas.com
📚 Grab your copy of The Manage Her: https://a.co/d/ej9A37z

📺 SUBSCRIBE for more leadership insights: https://www.youtube.com/@themanageher
📊 TAKE THE QUIZ: https://themanageher.com/blog/leigh-dundas-on-the-fight-for-change-no-one-talks-about
📝 FULL SHOW NOTES: https://themanageher.com/blog/leigh-dundas-on-the-fight-for-change-no-one-talks-about

#WomenLeaders #HumanTrafficking #Leadership #CareerPivot #SocialJustice #HumanRights #Courage #WomenInLaw #BoldLeadership #Advocacy

communityPosts.content:
What would make you pivot from a successful corporate career? 🤔

A) Finding work that aligns with your deeper values
B) Making a bigger impact on the world
C) Following a calling to serve others
D) All of the above

Just listened to Leigh Dundas share her incredible journey from corporate law to fighting human trafficking. Her story shows us that true leadership isn't about titles—it's about courage to fight for what's right. 💪

What's your take? Drop your thoughts below! ⬇️

"Leadership isn't about titles or corner offices—it's about having the courage to fight for what's right, even when the stakes are high." ✨

This powerful quote from human rights attorney Leigh Dundas hit me hard during our latest podcast conversation. She left a successful corporate law career to lead dangerous undercover missions against human trafficking. 🔥

Sometimes the most important leadership happens far from the spotlight, in the places where courage matters most.

What does true leadership look like to you? Share your thoughts! ⬇️

pinnedComment: 👋 What part of Leigh's journey resonated most with you? Her bold career pivot, the undercover work, or her approach to grassroots leadership? Share your thoughts below!
